title: Multicolor Construction Party Rectangular Plastic Table Cover (137cm x 213cm) 1 Piece - Vibrant Design for Kids & Theme Parties
features: CONSTRUCTION PARTY RECTANGULAR TABLE COVER: Add a splash of color and fun to your kids' construction-themed party with this high-quality plastic table cover, designed to transform your event space and make clean-up a breeze.

MULTICOLOR & VIBRANT DESIGN: Featuring a bright and eye-catching set of colors, perfect for engaging little ones and setting the stage for a memorable birthday celebration or themed event. Watch as children's eyes light up with excitement at the sight of this lively table cover.

IMPRESSIVE SIZE: Not too small, not too big - our plastic table cover is the perfect size for your party needs, fitting most rectangular tables with ease. Easily achieve a tidy and organized look for your event while protecting your table from spills and stains.

DURABLE PLASTIC MATERIAL: Made from sturdy and eco-friendly plastic, this table cover can withstand use by enthusiastic kids, providing a safe and easy-to-clean playing and eating surface. Simply wipe clean or toss it away after the party for a hassle-free experience.

IDEAL FOR KIDS & THEME PARTIES: This versatile table cover not only complements construction-themed parties but can also be used for various other celebrations, such as vehicle-themed events, school activities, or backyard play dates.
description: From the manufacturer Pumpkin Orange Midnight Black Powder Blue Ruby Red Construction Birthday Add-On Items Hard hats at the ready! Build an amazing Birthday party around these designs, perfect for the little construction worker in your life! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More Coordinating Ranges Available! If Construction Party isn't your taste, check out our other stylish options. Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights!
